text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Eye Screening * Native American Community 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF WARM SPRINGS WARM SPRINGS HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER WARM SPRINGS INDIAN HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers primary care, dental, optometry, specialized medical care, WIC, nutrition information, maternal and child healthcare, and a diabetes program. Also offers a mobile medical bus on the Warm Springs Reservation only. 1270 Kot-Num Road Warm Springs, OR 97761 Eligibility: Members of a federally recognized American Indian or Alaskan Native tribe or children of tribal members only Hours: -Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Firday 8am-5pm, Wednesday 1pm-5pm -Mobile medical bus schedule varies, call for location and dates (541) 553-1196 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF WARM SPRINGS WARM SPRINGS INDIAN HEALTH CENTER
